overview.short: Dronagiri Fort is a fort in Navi Mumbai's Raigad district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Dronagiri Fort is a fort in Navi Mumbai's Raigad district, Maharashtra, India.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Bodni
topPlaces.description: Bodni is a fishing village located on the northern coast of Raigad district, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Mora, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Mora is a port serving the town of Uran in Maharashtra, India. Ferry services connect to Ferry Wharf and Gateway of India in Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Dronagiri
topPlaces.description: Dronagiri is a node of South Navi Mumbai in Raigad district. Dronagiri railway station, located on the Port line, provides suburban rail connectivity, while road links connect the node to Uran, JNPT, and other parts of Navi Mumbai and Mumbai, respectively.

topPlaces.name: Uran
topPlaces.description: Uran is a coastal town in Raigad District's Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra state in Konkan division. It lies east of Mumbai, across the Dharamtar Creek.

topPlaces.name: Kegaon
topPlaces.description: Kegaon is a census town in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Uran is the nearest town.

topPlaces.name: Uran Gas Turbine Power Station
topPlaces.description: Uran Gas Turbine Power Station is a gas-based thermal power plant located at Uran in Raigad district, Maharashtra. The power plant is operated by the Maharashtra State Power Generation Company (Mahagenco).

topPlaces.name: 2010 Mumbai oil spill
topPlaces.description: The 2010 Mumbai oil spill occurred after the Panama-flagged Mediterranean Shipping Company's MSC Chitra; (IMO: 7814838) and Khalijia III (IMO: 8128690) collided off the coast of India near Mumbai on Saturday, 7 August 2010 at around 9:50 am local time. MSC Chitra, which was outbound from South Mumbai's Nava Sheva port, collided with the inbound Khalijia III, which caused about 200 cargo containers from MSC Chitra to be thrown into the Arabian Sea.

topPlaces.name: Sarde
topPlaces.description: Sarde is an Indian village in the Tehsil of Uran of the Raigad District of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

items.note: Bodni is a fishing village located on the northern coast of Raigad district, Maharashtra, India.
Mora is a port serving the town of Uran in Maharashtra, India. Ferry services connect to Ferry Wharf and Gateway of India in Mumbai.

Dronagiri is a node of South Navi Mumbai in Raigad district. Dronagiri railway station, located on the Port line, provides suburban rail connectivity, while road links connect the node to Uran, JNPT, and other parts of Navi Mumbai and Mumbai, respectively.
Uran is a coastal town in Raigad District's Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra state in Konkan division. It lies east of Mumbai, across the Dharamtar Creek.
Kegaon is a census town in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Uran is the nearest town.

Uran Gas Turbine Power Station is a gas-based thermal power plant located at Uran in Raigad district, Maharashtra. The power plant is operated by the Maharashtra State Power Generation Company (Mahagenco).

The 2010 Mumbai oil spill occurred after the Panama-flagged Mediterranean Shipping Company's MSC Chitra; (IMO: 7814838) and Khalijia III (IMO: 8128690) collided off the coast of India near Mumbai on Saturday, 7 August 2010 at around 9:50 am local time. MSC Chitra, which was outbound from South Mumbai's Nava Sheva port, collided with the inbound Khalijia III, which caused about 200 cargo containers from MSC Chitra to be thrown into the Arabian Sea.
Sarde is an Indian village in the Tehsil of Uran of the Raigad District of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (13 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत?
faq.a: Stays in Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dronagiri Fort द्रौणपुर रियासत?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bodni, Mora, Maharashtra, Dronagiri, Uran, Kegaon.
